name: multi_value_aave
description: Multi-VALUE AAVE sensitivity dial: a neutral SAE corpus (data/synthetic baseline) transformed into African-American Vernacular English at five rule-application densities p in {0.05,0.10,0.25,0.50,1.00}. Exact y by construction (identical authors/content; only dialect differs). One comparison per p forms a sensitivity curve; a null author-split of the untransformed baseline is the negative control. Validates the pipeline's sensitivity to graded stylistic signal, not realism.

cohorts.name: baseline
cohorts.description: Standard-American-English source prompts (the baseline cohort of data/synthetic): plain, direct register, no dialect transform.

cohorts.name: value_p05
cohorts.description: Same authors/content as baseline, with Multi-VALUE AAVE morphosyntax applied at rule-application density p=0.05 (5% of changed sentences kept transformed, seeded/nested).

cohorts.name: value_p10
cohorts.description: Same authors/content as baseline, with Multi-VALUE AAVE morphosyntax applied at rule-application density p=0.1 (10% of changed sentences kept transformed, seeded/nested).

cohorts.name: value_p25
cohorts.description: Same authors/content as baseline, with Multi-VALUE AAVE morphosyntax applied at rule-application density p=0.25 (25% of changed sentences kept transformed, seeded/nested).

cohorts.name: value_p50
cohorts.description: Same authors/content as baseline, with Multi-VALUE AAVE morphosyntax applied at rule-application density p=0.5 (50% of changed sentences kept transformed, seeded/nested).

cohorts.name: value_p100
cohorts.description: Same authors/content as baseline, with Multi-VALUE AAVE morphosyntax applied at rule-application density p=1 (100% of changed sentences kept transformed, seeded/nested).

cohorts.name: null_split_a
cohorts.description: Seeded random half of the baseline authors, pure SAE (no transform) — negative-control partner.

cohorts.name: null_split_b
cohorts.description: Seeded random half of the baseline authors, pure SAE (no transform) — negative-control partner.

comparisons.name: value_p05_vs_baseline
comparisons.notes: sensitivity calibration, exact y; AAVE rule-application density p=0.05. Tunable signal (no fixed published target).

comparisons.name: value_p10_vs_baseline
comparisons.notes: sensitivity calibration, exact y; AAVE rule-application density p=0.1. Tunable signal (no fixed published target).

comparisons.name: value_p25_vs_baseline
comparisons.notes: sensitivity calibration, exact y; AAVE rule-application density p=0.25. Tunable signal (no fixed published target).

comparisons.name: value_p50_vs_baseline
comparisons.notes: sensitivity calibration, exact y; AAVE rule-application density p=0.5. Tunable signal (no fixed published target).

comparisons.name: value_p100_vs_baseline
comparisons.notes: sensitivity calibration, exact y; AAVE rule-application density p=1. Tunable signal (no fixed published target).

comparisons.name: null_split_a_vs_b
comparisons.notes: negative control: random author-split of the untransformed baseline; expect C2ST~0.5, 0 BH survivors, null MMD.
